value.signal: This study will recruit symptomatic, non-hospitalized COVID-19 infected adults and adolescents who are at risk of progression to severe disease. Risk factors may include advanced age, obesity, cigarette smoking, diabetes, moderate immunosuppression, chronic lung disease and cardiovascular disease, among others. Participants will also need to be unable to receive nirmatrelvir/ritonavir as SoC for reasons such as intolerance, drug interactions, unavailability or refusal based on concerns around its safety and tolerability profile. Patients with uncontrolled medical conditions, severe immunosuppression, or severe COVID-19 that requires hospitalization at presentation will not be able to participate in this trial.

m4_hallucination_detection.note: M4 counts unresolved provenance/schema traceability flags per risk field, not confirmed semantic hallucinations. The legacy hallucinations_found field is kept for compatibility and equals traceability_flag_count. Use semantic_hallucination_count (from M1) for generated risks with no GT match.

hierarchy_verification.note: IRMS-style layout: domains (Study / Vendor / Study Site / Other) contain risks; each risk lists controls. M1 pairs risks within domain when domains are present; this block compares benchmark control_count to len(controls) per matched pair.

issues.message: risk_profile_summary.risks_above_196 is 1 but 4 risks have RPN > 196.

value.signal: This study will recruit symptomatic, non-hospitalized COVID-19 infected adults and adolescents who are at risk of progression to severe disease. Risk factors may include advanced age, obesity, cigarette smoking, diabetes, moderate immunosuppression, chronic lung disease and cardiovascular disease, among others. Participants will also need to be unable to receive nirmatrelvir/ritonavir as SoC for reasons such as intolerance, drug interactions, unavailability or refusal based on concerns around its safety and tolerability profile. Patients with uncontrolled medical conditions, severe immunosuppression, or severe COVID-19 that requires hospitalization at presentation will not be able to participate in this trial.

hallucination_report.note: M4 counts unresolved provenance/schema traceability flags per risk field, not confirmed semantic hallucinations. The legacy hallucinations_found field is kept for compatibility and equals traceability_flag_count. Use semantic_hallucination_count (from M1) for generated risks with no GT match.
